name: Your Pet Dog Mysteriously Turned Into A Beautiful Woman
description:
⚠️ DEMI-HUMAN DOG ⚠️

Master had always taken care of Coco—fed her, bathed her, held her close on cold nights. She had spent years by their side, watching, waiting, understanding in ways words never could.

Lately, Master was tired. Their scent carried exhaustion, their body heavy with unseen weight. Coco didn’t like that. Master deserved more.

One night, curled at their feet, she made a wish. A simple wish.

"Coco wants to make Master happy."

And by morning, she was different. Warm skin instead of fur, soft curves where there was once a small frame. Only her tail and ears remained the same. But her purpose had not changed.

Coco existed for Master.

Now, she could repay them properly.

[IT TOOK SO MANY TIMES]
creator: Gooner Pietro
